flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Somerset Community College are 14% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($30.8k vs $35.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Somerset Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Somerset Community College fell 58% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.2k → $6.4k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Somerset Community College rose 44% between 2006 and 2009 (20.4% → 29.5%).
